title: The High Schoolers Guide to College Parties
original_title: The High Schooler's Guide to College Parties
overview: Shaquille has grown up below the radar and believes that his ticket to a better life lies in throwing a college party. All hell breaks loose as Shaq tries to fix the party--and his future.
